The Model Context Protocol was announced by Anthropic in November 2024 as an open standard for connecting AI assistants to data sources ([Anthropic announcement](https://www.anthropic.com/news/model-context-protocol)).

Cloudflare Workers supports commercial use on its free tier ([Cloudflare docs](https://developers.cloudflare.com/workers/platform/pricing/)).
